title: geranium selloi
intro: Geranium selloi, also known as the Wild Geranium or Princes' Feather, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Geranium selloi include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
